DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-10-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Brandon Lansche, Esq. 213.250.1800 LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGAARD & SMITH LLP for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. Mr. Lansche submits to the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BMW OF NORTH AMERICA, LLC's DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

Defendant's unopposed "demurrer to the first cause of action plaintiff's first amended complaint" is sustained with leave to amend.

Mr. Lansche to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2022 Continued To Mar-01-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
